ramen-with-smoked-turkey-broth.name: Ramen With Smoked Turkey Broth

ingredients.prep: mung bean sprouts, cilantro leaves with tender stems, and lime wedges (for serving)

ingredients.item: Hon-dashi can be found at japanese markets and many supermarkets.

instructions: Heat oil in a large stockpot over medium. Cook onion, garlic, lemongrass, ginger, jalapeño, and cilantro stems, stirring occasionally, until lightly browned, about 5 minutes. Add wings and 10 cups water. Bring to a boil, reduce heat, and simmer until turkey meat is tender, 45–60 minutes. Strain into a large saucepan; reserve wings. Add hon-dashi and soy sauce to broth, adding more to taste if needed. Cover and keep warm. Pick meat from wings and set aside.
Do Ahead: Broth can be made 3 days ahead; cover and chill broth and meat separately.
Cook bok choy in a large pot of boiling salted water until crisp-tender, about 1 minute. Transfer to a colander with a slotted spoon.
Return water to a gentle boil and carefully lower eggs into water; cook 6 minutes. Transfer to a bowl of ice water to cool. Peel and halve lengthwise.

Return water to a boil and cook spaghetti, stirring occasionally, until al dente. Drain, then toss with sesame oil in a large bowl. Divide spaghetti among bowls. Ladle in broth and add kimchi, bok choy, eggs, and reserved turkey meat. Top with mushrooms, sprouts, and cilantro. Serve with lime wedges.

raspeary-baby-food-7-months.name: Raspeary Baby Food (7+ Months)
instructions: Steam pears and allow to cool.
Add pears and raspberries to a blender or food processor. Blend very well, until seeds are broken down.
Refrigerate up to 3 days or freeze up to 1 month.
NOTE: Check with your pediatrician before introducing new foods to children under 12 months.
Enjoy!

recipe-for-chicken-breasts-with-apple-ch.name: Recipe For Chicken Breasts With Apple Chutney
recipe-for-chicken-breasts-with-apple-ch.original_name: Receta de pechugas de pollo con chutney de manzana

ingredients.item: 1  taza  vinagre de manzana o vino blanco

instructions: Cortamos las manzanas en cubos.
We will heat up a frying pan or pan and add some water, about 3 cds.
Posteriormente los cubos de manzana y pondremos a cocinar a fuego bajo por 10 minutos hasta que se ablanden.
After this time, we will add apple vinegar or white wine, sugar, cinnamon powder, some salt and pepper to suit.
We mix and we will let cook for another 10 minutes so that our whole apple with sugar and wine will be conserved and all flavors united.
When those minutes are up, put up the fire and finish cooking till our chutney's dry, that's when all the liquid has been reduced and has a creamy texture.
Apaga y deja enfriar.
In an oil frying pan, cook the chicken breast cut into cubes and seasoned with the chicken, salt and pepper seasoning.
It's time to add apple chutney and cook for a few minutes, so that flavors complement.
Serve the chicken with apple chutney, add some finely minced peppermint and enjoy.

recipe-for-chicken-thighs-with-plum-sauc.name: Recipe For Chicken Thighs With Plum Sauce
recipe-for-chicken-thighs-with-plum-sauc.original_name: Receta de muslos de pollo con salsa de ciruela

ingredients.item: 8 chicken thighs (with or without skin as preferred)
300 gr de ciruelas frescas o secas (sin hueso).
1/3  de taza de vino tinto o jugo de uva
1 cda de mantequilla ((opcional, para darle brillo a la salsa))

instructions: Lava y seca los muslos de pollo con papel absorbente.
Mix garlic powder, pimenton, salt and pepper, and satitle his thighs.
In a big frying pan, heats olive oil with medium-high heat and seals its thighs from both sides until they are golden. Reserve.
In the same frying pan, add clawed pines, red wine (or grape juice), brown sugar, balsamic vinegar, chicken stock, cinnamon and ground nail.
Cooking at medium heat until the pums are tender and the salsa have been reduced a little (about 10-15 minutes).
Remove the cinnamon and liquidate the mixture to get a homogenous salsa. If necessary, pass through a paddle for more softness.
Put your chicken thighs back into the frying pan and see your pune sauce about them.
Cover and cook with low heat for 20-25 minutes, or until the thighs are well cooked and the sauce has been weighed.
Serve your thighs with salsa.

recipe-for-chicken-thighs-with-tamarind-.name: Recipe For Chicken Thighs With Tamarind And Chili Sauce
recipe-for-chicken-thighs-with-tamarind-.original_name: Receta de muslos de pollo con salsa de tamarindo y chile

ingredients.item: 8  muslos de pollo  ((con piel para mayor crocancia))
1 taza de yogur natural o suero de leche  ((buttermilk))
1 cdote of sweet or smoked peppermint
1 / 2 cdote of turmeric ((optional, to give color))
2 cds of honey or brown sugar

instructions: Mix the natural yogurt with garlic powder, onion powder, pimenton, turmeric, salt and pepper.
Summer the chicken thighs into the mixture and leave to marinate for at least 30 minutes, if more time better.
Once ready, heat up enough oil in a frying or deep frying frying frying pan at 180 been 3 been.
Take out the thighs from the marinade, leaving a light layer of yogurt attached and fry them directly into hot oil for 12-15 minutes, till they are golden and crispy.
Coloca los muslos en una rejilla para eliminar el exceso de aceite.
In a small frying pan, heat up some oil and pits the finely minced garlic, ginger and chilies for about 3 minutes.
Add tamarind pulp, honey or sugar, soy sauce and water. Cooking with medium heat till the mixture boils and thickens slightly.
Adjust the taste with more honey or soy sauce as your choice.
Serve the chicken thighs with tamarind and chili sauce apart so that every guest can bath the chicken or use it as a dip.

recipe-for-peas-with-ham-comedera.name: Recipe For Peas With Ham
recipe-for-peas-with-ham-comedera.original_name: Receta de guisantes con jamón caseros

ingredients.item: Two cups of the cooking stock of peas (also serving vegetable, chicken or veal).)

instructions: The first thing we'll do will be cook the peas. The cooking time can vary considerably depending on the type of peas you choose. You can use raw peas, frozen or even preserved. Nevertheless, note that the more fresh and better quality the ingredients, the more delicious this plate will be.
While cooking, we can use the time to peel and mince onion into small cubes.
We'll also peel his garlic tooth and mingle it or we'll shredder it.
In the case of peas, they have to be already cooked and drained so that we can use them. If we have cooked them, we will also keep the cooking stock.
We will also leave the serrano ham minced with cubes.
The following will be to heat an oil chorrit into an anti-stick frying pan. Once hot, we will cook garlic and onion over medium heat, stirring constantly.
Cocinaremos estos ingredientes hasta que la cebolla empiece a tornarse transparente.
When we reach this point, we add the minced ham and the tablespoon of flour. We'll mix and let them cook for another 2 minutes.
After this time, we will add the stock of the peas, or otherwise a few cups of homemade stock of vegetables, chicken or re.
1 We will also add salt and pepper to our taste. We'll mix everything up and try and if necessary we'll have more spices and we'll have them put them back together.

1 Once this time has passed, we will try and check and if necessary we will correct and mix them again.
1 That's all. Our ham peas are ready to serve.

recipe-for-traditional-chinese-short-rib.name: Recipe For Traditional Chinese Short Ribs

ingredients.item: 1 cda de polvo chino de cinco especias

instructions: Let's start our recipe, get your oven hot at 180 degrees Celsius.
Wash his ribs and get his fat.
Sazona las costillas con la cucharadita de polvo chino de cinco especias.
Put your ribs on an oven plate. Roast them some olive oil and get them to bake for about 20 minutes.
When you see that your ribs are well golden, get them out of the oven and let them stand on absorbing paper to remove excess fat.
Now put a saucer with medium heat in the kitchen. Add ketchup sauce, Worcestershire sauce, balsamic or apple vinegar and soy sauce. Mix very well and let cook for 10 minutes on low heat.
After that time, you'll add his sugar. You'll mix and finish cooking for another 10 minutes till they cook and weigh. Kill and let rest.

When your sour salsa's at room temperature, you'll be bathing all your ribs with this salsa and bringing them to the oven for another 20 minutes till they finish cooking and carameling with the salsa.
Finished this time, get them out of the oven. Let them scuba and scatter his minced celery and roasted sesame seeds.
Enjoy them!

red-lentil-salad-with-fresh-herbs.name: Red Lentil Salad With Fresh Herbs
instructions: Bring vegetable stock to a boil in a saucepan and add drained lentils. Stir and reduce to a simmer. Simmer uncovered, for 7 to 8 minutes. Lentils will be slightly undercooked. Drain, and allow to cool, about 30 minutes.
Place cooled lentils in a large mixing bowl and add minced fresh parsley and mint. Add white parts of the green onions, reserving the chopped greens for the garnish. Add tomatoes.
Combine extra-virgin olive oil and zest and juice of a lemon in a small bowl. Stir to combine, then pour over the salad and toss. Cover and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes, before serving.
Before serving, taste and add salt, if desired. Garnish with reserved chopped green tops of green onions.

red-lentil-soup-with-lemon-mint-yogurt.name: Red Lentil Soup With Lemon Mint Yogurt
instructions: Melt butter in a saucepan over medium-high heat. Add onion, tomato paste, and salt to melted butter. Cook, stirring often, until onion softens and tomato paste turns a deep brick red or brown color, 5 to 7 minutes.

Add garlic, cumin, and cayenne pepper; cook and stir for 2 minutes. Stir in broth and bring to a boil. Stir in lentils, celery, and carrot. Reduce heat to medium-low and simmer, stirring occasionally, until lentils and vegetables are very tender, 30 to 40 minutes.
Meanwhile, make lemon-mint yogurt: Grind mint and salt in a mortar and pestle to a paste. Add yogurt, lemon juice, and zest; stir together until combined. Refrigerate until ready to serve.
Taste soup for seasoning. Use an immersion blender to purée about 1/2 of the soup to achieve a creamier texture. Serve hot with spoonfuls of lemon-mint yogurt.

red-quinoa-salad-with-cauliflower-and-wa.name: Red Quinoa Salad With Cauliflower And Walnuts

ingredients.item: Finely chopped parsley plus some picked leaves for garnish
Kosher salt and freshly ground black pepper

instructions: Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil. Add quinoa and simmer until fully cooked, about 15 minutes. Drain and return quinoa to pot. Cover with a lid and let it sit for 5 additional minutes. Fluff with a fork and transfer to a large bowl or sheet pan to cool.

Combine cooled quinoa and the remaining ingredients in a large bowl. Season with salt, pepper and more lemon juice if desired. Transfer to a large serving bowl or platter, and scatter parsley leaves over. Serve cold or room temperature.

reindeer-food.name: Reindeer Food
instructions: Cover a large area of counter space with waxed paper and tape it down.
Mix pretzels, corn cereal, peanuts, and candy-coated milk chocolate pieces together in a large bowl.
Melt white chocolate in the top of a double boiler over simmering water, stirring frequently and scraping down the sides with a rubber spatula to avoid scorching.
Pour melted white chocolate over pretzel mixture; stir to evenly coat.
Quickly transfer mixture to the prepared waxed paper and spread in a thin layer; let cool completely, at least 30 minutes.
Break into pieces and store in an airtight container.

restaurant-style-vegetable-soup-recipe-l.name: Restaurant Style Vegetable Soup Recipe

ingredients.item: 2 tablespoons of olive oil or butter
6 cups chicken or vegetable suy  u
1 tsp of dry mint or fresh parsley (for service)

instructions: 1. Heat the olive oil or butter in a large pot.
2. Add onions and roast until pink.
3. Add yellowms and roast for 1 minute.
4. Carrot add potatoes, pumpkin, pepper, green beans and peas to the pot.
5. roast in medium fire up to 5 minutes.
6. Add and mix grated tomatoes to the car.
7. Add chicken or vegetable water, add salt, pepper and optional red powder pepper.
8. Leave the cake to boil, then cook about 25-30 minutes until the golden jealousy and vegetables cooked.
9. If you wish, you can make light-and-ccedil;e smooth or you can completely shred without fortune.
10. When serving u dry mint or fresh parsley sprinkle and fortune.
11.  Afiyet olsun.

retox-tequila-cocktail.name: Retox Tequila Cocktail
instructions: Rim half of a rocks glass with kosher salt. Muddle jalapeño in base of cocktail shaker. Add maple syrup, lemon, and tequila. Shake vigorously with ice.
Fill rimmed glass with fresh ice. Double strain cocktail (to remove any pepper bits) into prepared glass. Garnish with lemon slice.

rhubarb-butter-crunch.name: Rhubarb Butter Crunch
instructions: Preheat the oven to 191°C (190 degrees C). Grease a baking sheet.
Combine rhubarb, white sugar, and 3 tablespoons flour in a large bowl; spread onto the prepared baking sheet.
Combine 1 ½ cups flour, brown sugar, butter, and oats in a medium bowl; sprinkle over rhubarb mixture.
Bake in the preheated oven until browned and crunchy, 35 to 40 minutes.

rib-dry-rub.name: Rib Dry Rub
instructions: Whisk brown sugar in a medium bowl with a fork until texture is consistent.
Mix in kosher salt, black pepper, onion powder, garlic powder, mustard powder, ginger, cumin, chili powder, paprika, white pepper, celery salt, allspice, cinnamon, and cayenne pepper until combined.

rice-krispie-treats.name: Rice Krispie Treats

ingredients.item: Diamond crystal kosher salt; for table salt
ingredients.prep: use half as much by volume

instructions: Adjust oven racks to the second-from-top and second-from-bottom positions. Preheat oven to 325ºF (160ºC). Line 2 rimmed baking sheets with parchment (this will make it easier to transfer the rice krispies into a bowl after) and divide Rice Krispies evenly between the 2 sheets. Toast in the oven, stirring with a silicone spatula every 3 minutes, until evenly golden brown, about 10 minutes. Remove from oven and let cool 5 minutes. Lift up both the shorter sides of the parchment to form a “sleeve” to gather all the Rice Krispies, then transfer cereal to a large bowl. Set aside.
Meanwhile, line a 2-quart baking dish (see note) with parchment overhanging two sides and coat evenly with nonstick cooking spray. Set aside.

In a 6-quart pot, melt 4 tablespoons unsalted butter over medium heat, then cook, stirring and swirling, until milk solids turn golden brown and the butter smells nutty, 3 to 4 minutes. Reduce heat to low. Add salt and marshmallows, then, using a silicone spatula, stir until the marshmallows have just melted, about 4 minutes. Add toasted Rice Krispies and fold until evenly coated.
Scrape Rice Krispies mixture into prepared baking dish. Spray another spatula with nonstick cooking spray, then use it to press the mixture into an even layer.
Sprinkle all over with flaky salt. Allow bars to cool for 30 minutes before portioning.
To portion, remove bars from the baking dish and place on a cutting board. Using a serrated knife, cut bars into squares, rectangles, or your desired shape.

roasted-domino-potatoes.name: Roasted Domino Potatoes

ingredients.item: Kosher salt and fleur de sel

instructions: Preheat oven to 425°. Brush a 13x9x2" baking dish or cast-iron griddle with 2 Tbsp. butter. Peel potatoes and trim ends (do not rinse). Trim all 4 sides of potatoes to form a rectangle. Using a mandoline, cut potatoes crosswise into 1/8" slices, keeping slices in stacks as best you can.

Re-form slices from each potato into a stack. Place in prepared dish, fanning apart slightly like a deck of cards. Insert bay leaves between potato slices at even intervals. Season with salt and drizzle with remaining 4 Tbsp. butter.
Bake potatoes, rotating the dish halfway through cooking, until the edges are crisp and golden and the centers are tender, about 1 hour. Sprinkle with fleur de sel.

roasted-eggplant-parmesan-focaccia.name: Roasted Eggplant Parmesan Focaccia

ingredients.item: Salt and ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Preheat the oven to 232°C (230 degrees C). Line 2 baking sheets with parchment paper.
Cut eggplant into twelve 1/4-inch rounds and place on one of the prepared baking sheets. Spray both sides with cooking spray and season with salt and pepper.
Bake in the preheated oven for 20 minutes, flipping halfway through. Remove from the oven and turn on the broiler.

When you flip the eggplant, heat oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat. Add onions and cook until soft and starting to brown, about 5 minutes. Add garlic and cook, stirring continuously, until fragrant, about 30 seconds. Add cherry tomatoes, arugula, salt, cayenne pepper, and black pepper. Stir to flatten the cherry tomatoes and cook until arugula is wilted and sauce is hot, 3 to 5 minutes.
Place focaccia bread on the second baking sheet. Top each piece with 3 eggplant rounds and an equal amount of tomato sauce, then sprinkle Parmesan cheese over top.
Place under the broiler until cheese melts, about 1 minute. Sprinkle with oregano and serve.

roasted-salt-and-spice-packed-pork-loin.name: Roasted Salt- And Spice-packed Pork Loin

ingredients.prep: chine bone removed, all but 1/4 inch of fat trimmed

ingredients.item: Plus 2/3 cup freshly ground black pepper

instructions: Position rack in center of oven and preheat to 121°C. Sprinkle pork roast all over with 1 teaspoon coarse salt, 1 teaspoon pepper, and fennel seeds, patting to adhere. Heat olive oil in heavy large roasting pan over medium-high heat. Place pork, fat side down, in pan. Cook until brown on all sides and on ends, holding pork upright with tongs when necessary, about 12 minutes. Transfer pork to baking sheet and cool completely, about 20 minutes.

Combine 8 cups coarse salt, 2/3 cup black pepper, allspice, and juniper berries in same roasting pan. Stir to blend. Add 1 cup water and stir to moisten. Push ? to 3/4 of salt mixture to 1 side of pan, spreading remaining salt in long wide strip (about size of roast) as base for pork. Place pork, bone side down, on salt base. Pack remaining salt over entire roast, enclosing completely.
Roast pork in salt crust until instant-read thermometer inserted straight down into pork from top center registers 74°C, about 2 1/2 hours.

Transfer roasting pan to work surface. Let pork rest 10 to 20 minutes. Remove all salt from around pork. Transfer pork to cutting board, brushing off any remaining salt. Position roast so that bones are vertical. Cut between bones and meat to remove bone slab in 1 piece.
Place bone slab on platter. Arrange roast atop bones in original position. Carve roast and serve.
With the pork, pour a Côtes du Rhône. We like the Domaine Rouge-Bleu 2007 'Mistral' (France, $18). Its blackberry and earthy flavors and anise notes complement the meat deliciously.

roasted-tomato-sauce.name: Roasted Tomato Sauce
instructions: Preheat oven to 191°C. Spray rimmed baking sheet with nonstick spray. Arrange tomatoes, cut side up, on sheet. Toss with 2 tablespoons oil. Turn cut side up again if needed. Sprinkle with coarse salt, then oregano. Roast until soft but beginning to brown, 45 minutes to 1 hour. Cool on sheet.

Puree tomatoes in blender until smooth. Heat 2 tablespoons oil in large skillet over medium-high heat. Add garlic; sauté 30 seconds. Add tomato puree and tomato paste and bring to boil, whisking to blend. Boil until sauce is reduced to 2 1/2 cups, stirring often, about 3 minutes. Season with salt and pepper. Cool sauce. Cover and chill up to 3 days.

root-beer-baked-beans.name: Root Beer Baked Beans
instructions: Preheat oven to 204°C. Cook bacon in a large ovenproof pot over medium heat until crisp, stirring occasionally. Using a slotted spoon, transfer bacon to paper towels. Add onions to drippings in pot; cook until beginning to brown, stirring often, about 8 minutes. Add garlic; stir 1 minute. Add beans, root beer, vinegar, molasses, tomato paste, mustard, chili powder, 1 tsp. salt, and 1 tsp. pepper; stir to combine. Stir in bacon; bring to a boil. Transfer to oven; bake uncovered until liquid thickens, about 30 minutes.

rosemary-garlic-infused-olive-oil.name: Rosemary Garlic Infused Olive Oil

ingredients.prep: hung up until dried, or more to taste

instructions: Place garlic and dried rosemary sprigs in a glass container with a spout.
Pour in olive oil using a funnel.
Seal bottle and shake to combine.
Refrigerate until flavors infuse, at least 1 week.

rum-carlota-recipe-with-chocolate-comede.name: Rum Carlota Recipe With Chocolate
rum-carlota-recipe-with-chocolate-comede.original_name: Receta de carlota de ron con chocolate

ingredients.item: 2 paq de galletas de chispas de chocolate

instructions: Add soft cream cheese to a large bowl, add sugar and vanilla.
Bate bien hasta integrar. Luego vierte de poco en poco la crema batida.
Beat till the mixture's dense and get soft peaks. Reserve.
In a small bowl put the rum and to start mounting the carrot, remove the chocolate sparks cookies, with which you keep them in the rum for 15 seconds will be sufficient.
Put the cookies into a medium refractory and form the first cape. Then pour a portion of the cream and spread evenly and cover all the cookies.
Repeat the process by placing a layer of cookies previously soaked into rum and then a layer of cream and so to end with a layer of cream.
It wraps with a plastic paper and leads to the refrigerator for 6 to 8 hours.
Para servir, decora con jarabe de chocolate la superficie de la carlota.
Conserva en el refrigerador hasta el momento de servir.

rum-punch.name: Rum Punch
instructions: Heat sugar and 1⅓ cups water in a small saucepan over low, stirring, until sugar is dissolved.
Chill syrup until cold, about 30 minutes.
Combine syrup, rum, lime juice, bitters, and 4 cups water in a large pitcher or punch bowl and stir well.
Add ice (just enough to chill) and grate nutmeg over top.
Ladle into ice-filled glasses and garnish each with a lime wheel.
